info.name: DB Doctor
info.summary: Audit your MySQL, MariaDB, or PostgreSQL configuration for performance and reliability issues.
info.description:
DB Doctor checks the database powering your Nextcloud against best-practice rules ported from phpMyAdmin's advisor, plus a curated set of PostgreSQL checks.
* Get an at-a-glance health grade A through F with a numeric score * See plain-English recommendations for every rule that fails * Apply safe runtime fixes with one click, or copy a config snippet for permanent changes * Watch your score climb over time with a 30-day trend chart and per-rule sparklines * Weekly automatic check-ups notify admins when the database health declines * Health grade surfaced in Settings → Overview, and scriptable via `occ dbdoctor:check` * Nextcloud-specific checks: missing indices / columns / primary keys, utf8mb4 charset, InnoDB engine, and READ-COMMITTED isolation
DB Doctor is read-only by default, admin-only, and never phones home.
The MySQL/MariaDB rule set is ported from phpMyAdmin (GPL-2.0-or-later, compatible upward). The PostgreSQL rules are original to DB Doctor.
info.author: Frank Karlitschek
